title: Jupyter Notebook Collaboration
description: Real-time collaborative editing settings for Jupyter Notebook

collaborationEnabled.title: Enable Collaboration
collaborationEnabled.description: Enable real-time collaborative editing for notebooks. When enabled, multiple users can simultaneously edit the same notebook with live synchronization of changes, user presence awareness, and intelligent conflict resolution.

presenceTimeout.title: Presence Timeout (ms)
presenceTimeout.description: Time in milliseconds before marking a user as inactive in collaborative sessions. Users who don't interact with the notebook for this duration will be shown as idle to other collaborators.

autoLockTimeout.title: Auto Lock Timeout (ms)
autoLockTimeout.description: Time in milliseconds before automatically releasing cell locks. If a user holds a cell lock for this duration without activity, the lock will be automatically released to prevent blocking other users.

historySnapshotInterval.title: History Snapshot Interval (seconds)
historySnapshotInterval.description: Interval in seconds between automatic history snapshots for version tracking. More frequent snapshots provide finer-grained version history but may impact performance.

defaultPermissionRole.title: Default Permission Role
defaultPermissionRole.description: Default permission level assigned to users joining new collaborative sessions. This can be overridden by administrators on a per-session basis.
enumLabels: View Only - Read access and commenting only
Edit - Full editing capabilities with cell execution
Admin - Full control including permission management

showPresenceIndicators.title: Show Presence Indicators
showPresenceIndicators.description: Display user presence indicators such as avatars, cursor positions, and selection highlights in the notebook interface during collaborative sessions.

enableCellLocking.title: Enable Cell Locking
enableCellLocking.description: Enable automatic cell locking to prevent simultaneous edits. When enabled, cells are temporarily locked when a user begins editing to prevent conflicts.

autoSaveInterval.title: Auto Save Interval (seconds)
autoSaveInterval.description: Interval in seconds for automatic saving during collaborative sessions. More frequent saves ensure better data consistency but may increase server load.

maxConcurrentUsers.title: Max Concurrent Users
maxConcurrentUsers.description: Maximum number of users allowed in a single collaborative session. Limiting concurrent users helps maintain performance and reduces complexity.

enableComments.title: Enable Comments
enableComments.description: Enable collaborative commenting system allowing users to leave comments on cells for discussion and review purposes.

commentNotifications.title: Comment Notifications
commentNotifications.description: Show notifications when new comments are added or when you are mentioned in comments during collaborative sessions.
